Title: Adding a vehicle manually
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the vehicle configuration page
Test Data: Manual vehicle data (e.g., make, model, year, color)
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Add vehicle" button.
2. Enter the manual vehicle data in the provided fields.
3. Click on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The system saves the new vehicle and displays it in the vehicle list.

Title: Adding a vehicle from the dataset
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the vehicle configuration page
Test Data: A vehicle from the dataset (e.g., vehicle ID)
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Add vehicle" button.
2. Enter the vehicle ID in the search field.
3. Click on the "Search" button.
4. Select the vehicle from the search results.
5. Click on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The system saves the selected vehicle and displays it in the vehicle list.

Title: Accessing the list of distributions
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the vehicle configuration page
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "Access list of distributions" link.
Expected Result: The system displays the list of distributions.

Title: Successful user registration
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Register" button.
2. Enter the required registration data (e.g., email, password).
3. Click on the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The system registers the user successfully.

Title: Unsuccessful user registration (invalid email)
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Register" button.
2. Enter an invalid email address (e.g., incorrect format).
3. Click on the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The system displays an error message and does not register the user.

Title: Accessing and modifying page settings
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Settings" link in the navigation menu.
2. Click on the "Page settings" tab.
3. Modify the list of vowels.
4. Click on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The system saves the modified page settings.

Title: Accessing statistical pages
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "Statistics" link in the navigation menu.
Expected Result: The system displays the statistical pages.
